sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43389" key="eu)ana/lwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐανά-λωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, dub.l. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:10:2:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.2.2</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εὐανάδοτος</foreign> Daremb.).</entryFree>
